title: Acana Hanging Moth Killer Papers - Pack of 10 - Fragrance - Free, High Performance for Drawers, Wardrobes and Storage - Protects Clothing & Bedding - Long Lasting, Each Paper Lasts 6 Months
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: FRAGRANCE FREE - The Moth Papers are odourless, free from any fragrance
DECORATIVE PAPER - The Moth Papers are small, very slim and decorative to fit easily in your drawers.
WARDROBE USE - The papers can be pierced for hanging in wardrobes.
LASTS 6 MONTHS* - Each moth paper lasts 6 months (dependent on temperature & airflow)
SUITABLE MATERIALS - The papers are suitable for use with upholstery, leather, suede, nubuck, wool, velvet and silk.
